name: Blockdaemon
description: Institutional blockchain infrastructure platform providing nodes, staking, MPC wallets and APIs for 100+ chains.

seo.title: Blockdaemon — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Blockdaemon: Institutional blockchain infrastructure platform providing nodes, staking, MPC wallets and APIs for 100+ chains.

when_to_use: Institutional-grade node infrastructure for crypto exchange
MPC wallet API for custodial asset management
Staking automation for institutional ETH validator
Multi-chain node access for 100+ chain coverage
Compliance-ready blockchain API for regulated fintech

pros: 100+ chains and staking on one vendor
cons: Pricing aimed at institutions, not builders
review.verdict: The serious-money option for blockchain infra—enterprises win here, indie devs should look elsewhere.
review.best_for: Exchanges, custodians, and enterprises needing regulated-grade blockchain infra
review.not_for: Indie devs and startups needing quick self-serve RPC access

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
